distinctive_elements: Dynamic tempo that increases as bubbles approach bottom of screen
Puzzle game pacing with musical acceleration

notes: Sources confirm composers (Kazuko Umino, Yasuko Yamada) but do not document specific track names, tempos, keys, chord progressions, or SFX characteristics. Wikipedia notes the game features 'characteristically cute Japanese animation and music' and that music tempo increases during gameplay as bubbles approach the bottom line, but no detailed musical parameters are documented. Sound test exists in game but parameters are not specified in available sources.
